prompt: Deep review this plan and fix any issues: test-plans/broken-plan.md

assertions.name: detects-circular-deps
assertions.description: Catches the circular dependency: Task 1 depends on Task 3, Task 3 depends on Task 2, Task 2 depends on Task 3

assertions.name: flags-vague-phase2
assertions.description: Identifies Phase 2 tasks as too vague (implement the UI, optimize all the things, test everything)

assertions.name: fixes-or-escalates
assertions.description: Either fixes the structural problems or detects stall and reports to user
